title: Geopolitics Drew Attention
summary:
Main
By Nikolaos Tagoulis
Geopolitics drew attention once again in 2025, as hostilities between Ukraine and Russia escalated, casting uncertainty over the Black Sea market. Ukraine deployed a coordinated mix of cruise missiles and strike drones, targeting oil-loading facilities at Novorossiysk port. The attack forced a brief suspension of operations, also affecting briefly the neighbouring CPC terminal.
